title: centaurea boissieri var. suffrutescens
intro: Centaurea boissieri var. suffrutescens is a variety of the Centaurea boissieri plant, a type of thistle native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its compact growth and small, blue or purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Centaurea boissieri var. suffrutescens may include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide a range of health benefits when consumed.
